questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: All the elements of Group 15 form hydrides of the type $\mathrm{EH}_3$. From the following given statements with respect to $\mathrm{EH}_3$, select the incorrect one.
options: Basicity as well as reducing strength is maximum for $\mathrm{NH}_3$
Standard enthalpy of formation is negative only for $\mathrm{NH}_3$ while for others it is positive

HEH bond angle follows the order:
$\mathrm{NH}_3\gt\mathrm{PH}_3\gt\mathrm{AsH}_3\gt\mathrm{SbH}_3$
questions.solution:
Answer (A)
Basicity follows the order :
$\mathrm{NH}_3\gt\mathrm{PH}_3\gt\mathrm{AsH}_3\gt\mathrm{SbH}_3 \geq \mathrm{BiH}_3$

Reducing strength follows the order:
$\mathrm{NH}_3 \lt \mathrm{PH}_3 \lt \mathrm{AsH}_3 \lt \mathrm{SbH}_3 \lt \mathrm{BiH}_3$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.q:
Sulphur forms a number of oxoacids with hydrogen and oxygen. Consider the following statements with respect to oxoacid peroxodisulphuric acid:
I - All the S-atoms are present in +6 oxidation state.
II - It has one S-O-S linkage.
III - All the oxygen atoms are present in -2 oxidation state.
IV - The maximum number of identical sulphur-oxygen bonds are 4.
The correct statement(s) is/are
